languages.title: Taal
languages.subtitle: Kies die taal wat regdeur die toepassing gebruik word.
languages.noResults: Geen tale pas by jou soektog nie.

phone.label: Telefoonnommer
phone.noCountries: Geen lande pas by jou soektog nie.
phone.invalid: Voer 'n geldige telefoonnommer vir die gekose land in.

auth.onboardingTagline: 'n Persoonlike veiligheidsmetgesel vir die oomblikke tussen "Ek is fine" en "Ek het hulp nodig."
auth.createSubtitle: Kies 'n aanmeldmetode om jou veiligheidsgrafiek te beskerm.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Ons kon nie aanmelding voltooi nie. Gaan jou verbinding na en probeer weer.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Gebruik 'n plaaslike ontwikkelingsessie. Inheems Google Aanmelding werk in 'n ontwikkelingsbou.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Koppel nou of gaan voort en voeg dit later by.
auth.northStarBody: Die VL01 drabare kan veiligheidsvloei veroorsaak met krane en lang drukgebare.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Jou sagte veiligheidsmetgesel op die kaart en in oproepe.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear kan help met tuismodus, voogmodus, noodmodus, verskoningsoproepe en stemondersteuning.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Word gebruik vir die kaart, gevaarsones, veilige aankoms en SOS konteks.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving vra vir ligging sodat voogde kan verstaan ​​waar hulp nodig mag wees. Jy kan dit later in Instellings verander.
permissions.notificationsBody: Ons gebruik net kennisgewings vir veiligheidsaanwysings, noodopdaterings en onthounotas wat jy aktiveer.
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving gebruik jou ligging vir die veiligheidskaart, gevaarsones, vinnige deel en SOS konteks. Jy kan dit later in Instellings verander.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving stuur aantekenherinneringe, noodopdaterings en veiligheidsinstruksies wat jy aktiveer. Ons gebruik nie kennisgewings vir advertensies nie.
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving gebruik jou mikrofoon net wanneer jy 'n AI metgesel of veiligheidsoproep begin.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving gebruik Bluetooth om met NorthStar juweliersware te koppel, verbindingstatus te lees en veiligheidsvloeie van die drabare toestel te aktiveer.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving hou hierdie vloei beskikbaar vanaf Instellings en die kontroleskerm.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Kies die metgeselstem wat die veiligste voel om te hoor.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Vyf krane kan eskaleer na SOS en voogwaarskuwings.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Skep 'n grasieuse rede om 'n ongemaklike situasie te verlaat.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Begin 'n intydse metgesel-oproep wanneer jy ondersteuning nodig het.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Hou die juweliersware naby terwyl jy skandeer.
jewelry.noDevices: Geen nabygeleë NorthStar toestelle is nog gevind nie.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth skandering kon nie begin nie. Probeer asseblief weer.
jewelry.scanFailed: Ons kon nie nabygeleë juweliersware vind nie. Merk Bluetooth , hou NorthStar naby, en probeer weer.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth skandering kon nie begin nie. Kontroleer Bluetooth toegang en probeer weer.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Toegang na nabygeleë toestel is af. Laat Bluetooth toegang in Instellings toe, en probeer dan weer.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar het te lank geneem om te koppel. Beweeg dit nader en probeer weer.
jewelry.connectFailed: Ons kon nie aan NorthStar koppel nie. Maak seker dat dit gelaai is en naby is, en probeer dan weer.
jewelry.emptyMessage: Hou NorthStar gelaai en naby hierdie foon, en skandeer dan weer.

home.subtitle: Veiligheidsmetgesel-dashboard
home.readyBody: Stem, kaart, juweliersware en voogde is een kraan weg.

map.title: Veiligheid kaart
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go voorskou; Mapbox lewer in 'n ontwikkelingsbou.
map.updateFailed: Ons kon nie jou ligging opdateer nie. Probeer asseblief weer.
map.notRequested: Liggingtoegang is nie versoek nie. Jy kan dit later aktiveer vanaf Instellings.
map.permissionOff: Liggingtoegang is af. Aktiveer dit in Instellings om die veiligheidskaart op jou te sentreer.
map.timeout: Jou ligging neem langer as wat verwag is. Beweeg iewers heen met 'n duideliker sein en probeer weer.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Betroubare plekke wat jy stoor sal hier verskyn vir vinnige toegang.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.connectingSecurely: Koppel tans veilig aan jou stemmetgesel …

messagesWaiting.other: %{count} boodskappe wat wag om te stuur

safetyCall.typePlaceholder: Tik as dit moeilik is om te praat
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Begin die oproep of tik 'n boodskap wanneer jy gereed is.

chat.retryAccessibility: Probeer weer om boodskap te stuur

history.clearMessage: Dit verwyder gestoorde AI metgeselboodskappe van hierdie toestel af.
history.cannotUndo: Dit kan nie ongedaan gemaak word nie.
history.title: Gesprek geskiedenis
history.subtitle: AI metgeselboodskappe op hierdie toestel gestoor.
history.empty: Geen gesprekke is nog gestoor nie.
history.emptyMessage: Jou AI metgeselgesprekke sal hier verskyn na jou eerste oproep.
history.loadFailed: Ons kon nie gesprekgeskiedenis laai nie. Probeer asseblief weer.
history.clearFailed: Ons kon nie gesprekgeskiedenis uitvee nie. Probeer asseblief weer.
history.deleteFailed: Ons kon nie daardie gesprek uitvee nie. Probeer asseblief weer.

voices.title: My veiligheidsoproepstemme
voices.subtitle: Kies die metgeselstem wat reg voel om te hoor.
voices.selectionFailedMessage: Probeer asseblief om die stem weer te kies.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Hierdie stemvoorbeeld kon nie gespeel word nie. Probeer asseblief weer.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Gebruik saamgevoegde metgeselreaksies wanneer die netwerk- of Hume eiebewyse nie beskikbaar is nie.
settings.privacyBody: Voer die plaaslike data wat op hierdie toestel gestoor is uit of vee dit uit.
settings.exportFailedMessage: Kan nie jou data op die oomblik uitvoer nie.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Dit verwyder jou profiel, instellings, noodkontakte, gesprekgeskiedenis, toestemmingherinnerings en plaaslike magtigingsessie van hierdie toestel af.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Kan nie nou plaaslike data uitvee nie.
settings.updateFailedMessage: Ons kon nie daardie voorkeur stoor nie. Probeer asseblief weer.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Jou sessie is steeds aktief. Probeer asseblief weer.

contacts.title: Nood kontakte
contacts.subtitle: Betroubare mense beskikbaar tydens veiligheidsvloei.
contacts.name: Naam
contacts.empty: Geen noodkontakte is nog bygevoeg nie.
contacts.emptyMessage: Voeg iemand by wat jy vertrou sodat hulle gereed is wanneer 'n veiligheidsvloei hulle nodig het.
contacts.removeMessage: Hierdie persoon sal nie meer in jou noodstroom verskyn nie.
contacts.nameRequired: Voer die kontak se naam in.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Ons kon nie hierdie kontak stoor nie. Gaan die besonderhede na en probeer weer.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Ons kon nie hierdie kontak verwyder nie. Probeer asseblief weer.

friends.title: Vriende
friends.subtitle: Voogde, versoeke en noodgrafiek.
friends.emptyMessage: Betroubare vriende en voogde sal hier verskyn sodra hulle bygevoeg is.

emergency.title: Nood SOS
emergency.subtitle: Eskaleer slegs wanneer u onmiddellike ondersteuning benodig.
emergency.body: Dit sal jou veiligheidsvloei in kennis stel en noodkontakte voorberei.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Liggingdeling-stomp is gereed. Koppel die backend-deel-eindpunt om regstreekse skakels te stuur.

capybearTap.title: Capybear tik
capybearTap.subtitle: Dubbeltik jou NorthStar om 'n veiligheidslemoen te laat val.

errors.voiceOffline: Jy lyk vanlyn. Jou boodskap sal gestuur word wanneer jy weer koppel.
errors.voiceQueued: Boodskap is gestoor. Dit sal gestuur word wanneer die stemmetgesel weer koppel.
errors.voiceRetrying: Probeer tans om jou boodskap weer te stuur...
errors.voiceConnecting: Koppel tans veilig aan jou stemmetgesel …
errors.microphone: Mikrofoontoegang word benodig vir stemoproepe. Jy kan dit in Instellings aktiveer, of eerder 'n boodskap tik.
errors.billing: Die aanlyn stemmetgesel is tydelik onbeskikbaar. Jy kan voortgaan met die vanlyn metgesel.
errors.authentication: Die stemmetgesel kon nie hierdie sessie verifieer nie. Meld weer aan of gebruik die vanlyn metgesel vir eers.
errors.timeout: Die stemgenoot het te lank geneem om te reageer. Gaan jou verbinding na en probeer weer.
errors.network: Ons kon nie die stemgenoot bereik nie. Gaan jou verbinding na, probeer dan weer of gaan vanlyn voort.
errors.genericVoice: Iets het die stemoproep onderbreek. Probeer weer, of gaan voort met die vanlyn metgesel.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving benodig mikrofoontoegang vir veiligheid en AI metgeseloproepe.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving gebruik jou ligging vir die veiligheidskaart en nabygeleë veiligheidskenmerke.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving gebruik Bluetooth om aan jou NorthStar veiligheidsjuweliersware te koppel.
ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Hierdie aanmeldopsie is nie in hierdie weergawe beskikbaar nie.
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Demonstrasiemodus gebruik slegs plaaslike toetsdata. Gekoppelde dienste is nie geverifieer nie, en hierdie sessie word teruggestel wanneer die toepassing herlaai.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Die verifikasiekode is ongeldig of het verval. Versoek ’n nuwe kode en probeer weer.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Te veel aanmeldpogings. Wag ’n oomblik en probeer dan weer.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Aanmeldverifikasie het te lank geneem. Gaan jou verbinding na en probeer weer.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Ons kon nie die aanmelddiens bereik nie. Gaan jou verbinding na en probeer weer.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Jou sessie het verval. Meld weer aan.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Die veiligheidskaart kon nie laai nie. Gaan jou verbinding na en probeer weer.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Regstreekse ligging is nie beskikbaar nie. Jou laaste gestoorde ligging van %{capturedAt} word gewys.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Ons kon nie jou ligging deel nie. Gaan liggingtoegang na en probeer weer.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Hier is my ligging wat om %{capturedAt} aangeteken is:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Hier is my laaste gestoorde ligging wat om %{capturedAt} aangeteken is:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Bluetooth-toegang is af. Aktiveer dit in Instellings en probeer dan weer.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Bluetooth is afgeskakel. Skakel dit aan en probeer dan weer.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Bluetooth-paring is nie op hierdie toestel of in hierdie weergawe beskikbaar nie.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Ons kon nie NorthStar vind nie. Hou dit naby, gaan Bluetooth na en probeer weer.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Geen nabygeleë NorthStar-toestelle is gevind nie. Hou dit naby en skandeer weer.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Ons kon nie aan NorthStar koppel nie. Hou dit gelaai en naby en probeer dan weer.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Ons kon nie hierdie plek stoor nie. Probeer weer.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Foonskakelaar oopgemaak; oproep nie bevestig nie.
releaseCritical.sosCancelled: Gekanselleer; geen oproep is gemaak nie.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Geen noodkontak was beskikbaar nie; geen oproep is gemaak nie.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Die foonskakelaar kon nie oopmaak nie; geen oproep is gemaak nie.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Die laaste SOS-poging kon nie bevestig word nie.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Die stemmetgesel is tans nie beskikbaar nie. Probeer later weer of gaan voort met die vanlyn metgesel.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
